---
date: '2026-07-06T00:00:00-04:00'
title: Software
---

R packages developed and maintained by the R Computing Lab, mostly built around genetically-informed research designs — pedigrees, kinship, and family-based models — without requiring twin samples.

## Maintainer

- [**ggpedigree**](https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.ggpedigree) — Visualizing pedigrees with `ggplot2` and `plotly`.
- [**BGmisc**](https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.BGmisc) — Extended behavior genetics analysis: relatedness, pedigree construction, and variance component tools.
- [**discord**](https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.discord) — Functions for discordant kinship (sibling/cousin comparison) modeling.
- [**NlsyLinks**](https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.NlsyLinks) — Utilities and kinship links for research with the National Longitudinal Survey of Youth (NLSY).

## Contributor

- [**ACEsimFit**](https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.ACEsimFit) — ACE kin-pair data simulation and model fitting.

Bug reports and contributions are welcome on each package's GitHub repo, linked from its CRAN page above.
